name: idfm-journey-skill
description: Query Paris public transit (IDFM) — place search, journey planning, and incident reports. Integrates with Île-de-France Mobilités API for real-time transit data.
review: Solid Paris IDFM transit integration covering place search, journey planning, and incident reports. 1689 downloads. Useful niche skill for Paris commuters and travel automation. Conditional approval — good functionality and uniqueness.
